deduped)\n            <stem>_meta.parquet      — per-sector ProvidedCHO metadata\n            prov.duckdb              — updated prov_entities table\n            concept_labels.duckdb    — updated concept_labels table\n            agent_labels.duckdb      — updated agent_labels table\nDeps:       stdlib + duckdb + pyarrow\nAssumes:    SQLite has objs(uid VARCHAR, bufgz BLOB); JSON follows DDB EDM cortex format.\n\"\"\"\n\nfrom __future__ import annotations\n\nimport argparse\nimport csv\nimport fcntl\nimport gzip\nimport json\nimport logging\nimport re\nimport sqlite3\nfrom pathlib import Path\n\nimport pyarrow as pa\nimport pyarrow.parquet as pq\n\nfrom .constants import GRAPH_PROV, DDB_ITEM_BASE\nfrom .emitters import emit_prov_triples\nfrom .utils import coerce_list, normalize_date\n\n# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------\n# Parquet schema\n# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------\n\nAGENT_STRUCT = pa.struct([\n    pa.field(\"name\",       pa.string()),\n    pa.field(\"type\",       pa.string()),\n    pa.field(\"is_ext_uri\", pa.bool_()),\n])\n\nDATE_STRUCT = pa.struct([\n    pa.field(\"value\", pa.string()),\n    pa.field(\"begin\", pa.string()),\n    pa.field(\"end\",   pa.string()),\n    pa.field(\"type\",  pa.string()),\n])\n\nSUBJECT_STRUCT = pa.struct([\n    pa.field(\"name\",       pa.string()),\n    pa.field(\"is_ext_uri\", pa.bool_()),\n])\n\nPARQUET_SCHEMA = pa.schema([\n    (\"obj_id\",         pa.string()),\n    (\"title\",          pa.string()),\n    (\"lang_title\",     pa.string()),\n    (\"lang_obj\",       pa.string()),\n    (\"provider_id\",    pa.string()),\n    (\"dataset_id\",     pa.string()),\n    (\"dc_type\",        pa.list_(pa.string())),\n    (\"agents\",         pa.list_(AGENT_STRUCT)),\n    (\"dates\",          pa.list_(DATE_STRUCT)),\n    (\"dc_subject\",     pa.list_(SUBJECT_STRUCT)),\n    (\"hierarchy_type\", pa.int16()),\n    (\"mediatype\",      pa.int16()),\n    (\"sector\",         pa.int16()),\n    (\"is_part_of\",     pa.bool_()),\n])\n\n# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------\n# Constants\n# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------\n\n_DDB_VOCNET = \"http://ddb.vocnet.org/\"\n_BARE_ID_RE = re.compile(r'^[A-Z0-9]{32}$')\n_QUALIFIER_RE = re.compile(r'\\([^)]*\\)')\n\nLIDO_CREATED: frozenset[str] = frozenset({\n    \"http://terminology.lido-schema.org/lido00012\",\n    \"http://terminology.lido-schema.org/eventType/creation\",\n    \"http://terminology.lido-schema.org/lido00007\",\n})\nLIDO_ISSUED: frozenset[str] = frozenset({\n    \"http://terminology.lido-schema.org/lido00228\",\n    \"http://terminology.lido-schema.org/eventType/publication\",\n})\n\n# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------\n# Helpers\n# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------\n\ndef _is_ext_uri(resource: str) -> bool:\n    \"\"\"True if resource is an HTTP URI that is not a bare 32-char DDB ID.\"\"\"\n    return bool(resource) and resource.startswith(\"http\") and not _BARE_ID_RE.match(resource)\n\n\ndef _scalar_str(val) -> str | None:\n    \"\"\"Return the first non-empty string value from a cortex field.\"\"\"\n    if val is None:\n        return None\n    if isinstance(val, str):\n        return val or None\n    if isinstance(val, dict):\n        return val.get(\"$\") or None\n    if isinstance(val, list):\n        for item in val:\n            result = _scalar_str(item)\n            if result:\n                return result\n    return None\n\n\ndef _scalar_values(val) -> list[str]:\n    \"\"\"Extract all string values from a cortex field (scalar / dict / list).\"\"\"\n    if val is None:\n        return []\n    if isinstance(val, str):\n        return [val] if val else []\n    if isinstance(val, dict):\n        v = val.get(\"$\") or \"\"\n        return [v] if v else []\n    if isinstance(val, list):\n        out: list[str] = []\n        for item in val:\n            out.extend(_scalar_values(item))\n        return out\n    return []\n\n\ndef _parse_dc_date(raw: str) -> str | None:\n    \"\"\"Strip parenthesized qualifiers and brackets, return first normalized date value.\"\"\"\n    if not raw:\n        return None\n    clean = _QUALIFIER_RE.sub(\"\", raw).strip().strip(\"[]\").strip()\n    if not clean:\n        return None\n    vals = normalize_date(clean)\n    return vals[0] if vals else None\n\n\ndef _build_concept_labels(rdf: dict) -> dict[str, str]:\n    \"\"\"Build URI → prefLabel map from all Concept blocks in the record.\"\"\"\n    result: dict[str, str] = {}\n    for c in coerce_list(rdf.get(\"Concept\")):\n        if not isinstance(c, dict):\n            continue\n        about = (c.get(\"about\") or \"\").strip()\n        if not about:\n            continue\n        for item in coerce_list(c.get(\"prefLabel\")):\n            if isinstance(item, dict):\n                label = item.get(\"$\") or \"\"\n            elif isinstance(item, str):\n                label = item\n            else:\n                continue\n            if label:\n                result[about] = label\n                break\n    return result\n\n\ndef _build_agent_name_map(rdf: dict) -> dict[str, str]:\n    \"\"\"Build URI → name map from Agent and Organization entities in the record.\"\"\"\n    result: dict[str, str] = {}\n    for entity_type in (\"Agent\", \"Organization\"):\n        for ent in coerce_list(rdf.get(entity_type)):\n            if not isinstance(ent, dict):\n                continue\n            about = (ent.get(\"about\") or \"\").strip()\n            if not about:\n                continue\n            for key in (\"prefLabel\", \"name\", \"altLabel\"):\n                for item in coerce_list(ent.get(key)):\n                    if isinstance(item, dict):\n                        label = item.get(\"$\") or \"\"\n                    elif isinstance(item, str):\n                        label = item\n                    else:\n                        continue\n                    if label:\n                        result[about] = label\n                        break\n                if about in result:\n                    break\n    return result\n\n\ndef _agent_field(\n    field_val,\n    agent_type: str,\n    agent_labels_pending: dict[str, str | None],\n) -> list[dict]:\n    \"\"\"Convert creator/contributor/publisher field to {name, type, is_ext_uri} structs.\"\"\"\n    out: list[dict] = []\n    for v in coerce_list(field_val):\n        if isinstance(v, dict):\n            name = v.get(\"$\") or \"\"\n            res  = v.get(\"resource\") or \"\"\n            ext  = _is_ext_uri(res)\n            if ext:\n                agent_labels_pending.setdefault(res, name or None)\n            if name or res:\n                out.append({\"name\": name, \"type\": agent_type, \"is_ext_uri\": ext})\n        elif isinstance(v, str) and v:\n            out.append({\"name\": v, \"type\": agent_type, \"is_ext_uri\": False})\n    return out\n\n\ndef _lido_agents(\n    cho: dict,\n    rdf: dict,\n    lido_labels: dict[str, str],\n    agent_name_map: dict[str, str],\n) -> list[dict]:\n    \"\"\"Extract LIDO participants from hasMet → Event.P11_had_participant.\"\"\"\n    out: list[dict] = []\n    event_map = {\n        e[\"about\"]: e for e in coerce_list(rdf.get(\"Event\"))\n        if isinstance(e, dict) and e.get(\"about\")\n    }\n    for hm in coerce_list(cho.get(\"hasMet\")):\n        if not isinstance(hm, dict):\n            continue\n        ev_ref = hm.get(\"resource\")\n        if not ev_ref:\n            continue\n        ev = event_map.get(ev_ref, {})\n        ht = ev.get(\"hasType\") or {}\n        ht_uri = ht.get(\"resource\") if isinstance(ht, dict) else None\n        event_label = lido_labels.get(ht_uri or \"\", \"unknown_event\")\n        for p in coerce_list(ev.get(\"P11_had_participant\")):\n            if not isinstance(p, dict):\n                continue\n            res  = p.get(\"resource\") or \"\"\n            name = p.get(\"$\") or agent_name_map.get(res, \"\")\n            ext  = _is_ext_uri(res)\n            out.append({\"name\": name, \"type\": event_label, \"is_ext_uri\": ext})\n    return out\n\n\ndef _timespan_to_date(ts: dict, date_type: str) -> dict | None:\n    \"\"\"Convert a TimeSpan dict to a {value, begin, end, type} struct.\"\"\"\n    ts_begin = (_scalar_values(ts.get(\"begin\")) or [None])[0]\n    ts_end   = (_scalar_values(ts.get(\"end\"))   or [None])[0]\n    if ts_begin is None and ts_end is None:\n        pref = (_scalar_values(ts.get(\"prefLabel\")) or [None])[0]\n        return {\"value\": pref, \"begin\": None, \"end\": None, \"type\": date_type} if pref else None\n    if ts_begin and ts_end and ts_begin == ts_end:\n        return {\"value\": ts_begin, \"begin\": None, \"end\": None, \"type\": date_type}\n    return {\"value\": None, \"begin\": ts_begin, \"end\": ts_end, \"type\": date_type}\n\n\ndef _lido_dates(\n    events: list,\n    ts_map: dict[str, dict],\n    lido_uris: frozenset[str],\n    date_type: str,\n) -> list[dict]:\n    \"\"\"Extract date structs from LIDO events matching lido_uris via TimeSpan lookup.\"\"\"\n    out: list[dict] = []\n    for ev in events:\n        if not isinstance(ev, dict):\n            continue\n        ht = ev.get(\"hasType\") or {}\n        ht_uri = ht.get(\"resource\") if isinstance(ht, dict) else None\n        if ht_uri not in lido_uris:\n            continue\n        oc = ev.get(\"occuredAt\") or ev.get(\"occurredAt\")\n        if not oc:\n            continue\n        ts_ref = oc.get(\"resource\") if isinstance(oc, dict) else oc\n        ts = ts_map.get(ts_ref, {}) if isinstance(ts_ref, str) else {}\n        d = _timespan_to_date(ts, date_type)\n        if d:\n            out.append(d)\n    return out\n\n\ndef _resolve_subject_items(\n    field_val,\n    concept_labels: dict[str, str],\n    concept_labels_pending: dict[str, str | None],\n) -> list[dict]:\n    \"\"\"Convert subject field values to {name, is_ext_uri} structs.\"\"\"\n    out: list[dict] = []\n    for v in coerce_list(field_val):\n        if isinstance(v, dict):\n            lit = v.get(\"$\") or \"\"\n            res = v.get(\"resource\") or \"\"\n            if lit:\n                out.append({\"name\": lit, \"is_ext_uri\": False})\n            elif res and _is_ext_uri(res) and not res.startswith(_DDB_VOCNET):\n                label = concept_labels.get(res)\n                if label:\n                    out.append({\"name\": label, \"is_ext_uri\": True})\n                else:\n                    concept_labels_pending.setdefault(res, None)\n        elif isinstance(v, str) and v and not _BARE_ID_RE.match(v):\n            out.append({\"name\": v, \"is_ext_uri\": False})\n    return out\n\n\n# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------\n# Record extraction\n# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------\n\ndef extract_record(\n    data: dict,\n    lido_labels: dict[str, str],\n) -> tuple[dict, dict[str, str | None], dict[str, str | None]]:\n    \"\"\"Extract a Parquet row + pending label DB inserts from one record.\n\n    Returns:\n        (parquet_row, concept_labels_pending, agent_labels_pending)\n    \"\"\"\n    props     = data.get(\"properties\") or {}\n    prov_info = data.get(\"provider-info\") or {}\n    rdf       = (data.get(\"edm\") or {}).get(\"RDF\") or {}\n    cho       = rdf.get(\"ProvidedCHO\") or {}\n    if isinstance(cho, list):\n        cho = cho[0] if cho else {}\n\n    events    = coerce_list(rdf.get(\"Event\"))\n    timespans = coerce_list(rdf.get(\"TimeSpan\"))\n    ts_map    = {\n        t[\"about\"]: t for t in timespans\n        if isinstance(t, dict) and t.get(\"about\")\n    }\n\n    concept_labels        = _build_concept_labels(rdf)\n    agent_name_map        = _build_agent_name_map(rdf)\n    concept_labels_pending: dict[str, str | None] = {}\n    agent_labels_pending:   dict[str, str | None] = {}\n\n    # -- title + lang_title --\n    title_raw  = cho.get(\"title\")\n    title_str  = \"\"\n    lang_title = \"\"\n    if isinstance(title_raw, list):\n        title_raw = title_raw[0] if title_raw else None\n    if isinstance(title_raw, dict):\n        title_str  = title_raw.get(\"$\") or \"\"\n        lang_title = title_raw.get(\"lang\") or \"\"\n    elif isinstance(title_raw, str):\n        title_str = title_raw\n\n    # -- lang_obj --\n    lang_obj = _scalar_str(cho.get(\"language\") or cho.get(\"dcTermsLanguage\")) or \"\"\n\n    # -- dc_type labels --\n    dc_type_labels: list[str] = []\n    for v in coerce_list(cho.get(\"dcType\")):\n        if isinstance(v, dict):\n            lit = v.get(\"$\") or \"\"\n            res = v.get(\"resource\") or \"\"\n            if lit:\n                dc_type_labels.append(lit)\n            elif res and not res.startswith(_DDB_VOCNET) and _is_ext_uri(res):\n                label = concept_labels.get(res)\n                if label:\n                    dc_type_labels.append(label)\n                else:\n                    concept_labels_pending.setdefault(res, None)\n        elif isinstance(v, str) and v:\n            dc_type_labels.append(v)\n\n    # -- dc_subject structs (three field variants) --\n    dc_subj: list[dict] = []\n    for key in (\"dcSubject\", \"dcTermsSubject\", \"dcTermSubject\"):\n        dc_subj.extend(\n            _resolve_subject_items(cho.get(key), concept_labels, concept_labels_pending)\n        )\n\n    # -- agents unified --\n    agents: list[dict] = (\n        _agent_field(cho.get(\"creator\"),     \"creation\",    agent_labels_pending)\n        + _agent_field(cho.get(\"publisher\"), \"publication\", agent_labels_pending)\n        + _agent_field(cho.get(\"contributor\"), \"contribution\", agent_labels_pending)\n        + _lido_agents(cho, rdf, lido_labels, agent_name_map)\n    )\n\n    # -- dates unified --\n    dates: list[dict] = []\n    dc_date_raw = _scalar_str(cho.get(\"date\"))\n    if dc_date_raw:\n        normed = _parse_dc_date(dc_date_raw)\n        if normed:\n            dates.append({\"value\": normed, \"begin\": None, \"end\": None, \"type\": \"unknown_event\"})\n    for val in _scalar_values(cho.get(\"created\")):\n        dates.append({\"value\": val, \"begin\": None, \"end\": None, \"type\": \"creation\"})\n    for val in _scalar_values(cho.get(\"issued\")):\n        dates.append({\"value\": val, \"begin\": None, \"end\": None, \"type\": \"publication\"})\n    dates.extend(_lido_dates(events, ts_map, LIDO_CREATED, \"creation\"))\n    dates.extend(_lido_dates(events, ts_map, LIDO_ISSUED,  \"publication\"))\n\n    # -- mediatype / sector (int16) --\n    mediatype: int | None = None\n    sector:    int | None = None\n    for c in coerce_list(rdf.get(\"Concept\")):\n        if not isinstance(c, dict):\n            continue\n        about = c.get(\"about\") or \"\"\n        if mediatype is None and \"/medientyp/mt\" in about:\n            try:\n                mediatype = int(about.rsplit(\"/mt\", 1)[-1])\n            except ValueError:\n                pass\n        if sector is None and \"/sparte/sparte\" in about:\n            try:\n                sector = int(about.rsplit(\"/sparte\", 1)[-1])\n            except ValueError:\n                pass\n\n    # -- hierarchy_type (int16) --\n    raw_ht = (_scalar_values(cho.get(\"hierarchyType\")) or [None])[0]\n    htype: int | None = None\n    if raw_ht:\n        try:\n            htype = int(raw_ht.replace(\"htype_\", \"\"))\n        except ValueError:\n            pass\n\n    row = {\n        \"obj_id\":         props.get(\"item-id\", \"\"),\n        \"title\":          title_str,\n        \"lang_title\":     lang_title,\n        \"lang_obj\":       lang_obj,\n        \"provider_id\":    prov_info.get(\"provider-ddb-id\", \"\"),\n        \"dataset_id\":     props.get(\"dataset-id\", \"\"),\n        \"dc_type\":        dc_type_labels,\n        \"agents\":         agents,\n        \"dates\":          dates,\n        \"dc_subject\":     dc_subj,\n        \"hierarchy_type\": htype,\n        \"mediatype\":      mediatype,\n        \"sector\":         sector,\n        \"is_part_of\":     bool(cho.get(\"isPartOf\")),\n    }\n    return row, concept_labels_pending, agent_labels_pending\n\n\n# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------\n# Locked DB writes\n# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------\n\ndef _write_prov_db(\n    prov_db_path: Path,\n    prov_out_path: Path,\n    new_entities: dict[str, str],\n    new_prov_lines: list[str],\n) -> None:\n    \"\"\"Lock-protected write to prov.duckdb + idempotent append to prov-shared.nq.\"\"\"\n    import duckdb\n    with open(str(prov_db_path) + \".lock\", \"a\") as lf:\n        fcntl.flock(lf, fcntl.LOCK_EX)\n        try:\n            conn = duckdb.connect(str(prov_db_path))\n            conn.execute(\"\"\"\n                CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS prov_entities (\n                    uri         VARCHAR PRIMARY KEY,\n                    entity_type VARCHAR NOT NULL\n                )\n            \"\"\")\n            uris = list(new_entities.keys())\n            if uris:\n                ph = \",\".join(\"?\" * len(uris))\n                existing = {r[0] for r in conn.execute(\n                    f\"SELECT uri FROM prov_entities WHERE uri IN ({ph})\", uris\n                ).fetchall()}\n            else:\n                existing = set()\n            truly_new = {u: t for u, t in new_entities.items() if u not in existing}\n            if truly_new:\n                conn.executemany(\n                    \"INSERT OR IGNORE INTO prov_entities VALUES (?, ?)\",\n                    list(truly_new.items()),\n                )\n            conn.close()\n            if truly_new:\n                truly_new_nts = {f\"<{u}>\" for u in truly_new}\n                with open(prov_out_path, \"a\", encoding=\"utf-8\") as pf:\n                    for line in new_prov_lines:\n                        subj = line.split(\" \", 1)[0]\n                        if subj in truly_new_nts:\n                            pf.write(line + \"\\n\")\n        finally:\n            fcntl.flock(lf, fcntl.LOCK_UN)\n\n\ndef _write_labels_db(\n    db_path: Path,\n    table: str,\n    pending: dict[str, str | None],\n) -> None:\n    \"\"\"Lock-protected INSERT OR IGNORE of (uri, label) pairs into a labels DuckDB.\"\"\"\n    if not pending:\n        return\n    import duckdb\n    with open(str(db_path) + \".lock\", \"a\") as lf:\n        fcntl.flock(lf, fcntl.LOCK_EX)\n        try:\n            conn = duckdb.connect(str(db_path))\n            conn.execute(f\"\"\"\n                CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS {table} (\n                    uri   VARCHAR PRIMARY KEY,\n                    label VARCHAR\n                )\n            \"\"\")\n            conn.executemany(\n                f\"INSERT OR IGNORE INTO {table} VALUES (?, ?)\",\n                list(pending.items()),\n            )\n            conn.close()\n        finally:\n            fcntl.flock(lf, fcntl.LOCK_UN)\n\n\n# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------\n# Main\n# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------\n\ndef main() -> None:\n    parser = argparse.ArgumentParser(\n        description=\"Pass 1 prescan: PROV-O shared nodes + label DBs + Parquet\"\n    )\n    parser.add_argument(\"--db\",                type=Path, required=True,\n                        help=\"Sector SQLite file (objs table, bufgz column)\")\n    parser.add_argument(\"--prov-db\",           type=Path, required=True, dest=\"prov_db\",\n                        help=\"Shared prov.duckdb (prov_entities table); created if absent\")\n    parser.add_argument(\"--concept-labels-db\", type=Path, required=True, dest=\"concept_labels_db\",\n                        help=\"Shared concept_labels.duckdb; created if absent\")\n    parser.add_argument(\"--agent-labels-db\",   type=Path, required=True, dest=\"agent_labels_db\",\n                        help=\"Shared agent_labels.duckdb; created if absent\")\n    parser.add_argument(\"--lido\",              type=Path, required=True,\n                        help=\"lido_event_types.csv (resource → label)\")\n    parser.add_argument(\"--prov-out\",          type=Path, required=True, dest=\"prov_out\",\n                        help=\"prov-shared.nq output (appended, deduped)\")\n    parser.add_argument(\"--parquet-out\",       type=Path, required=True, dest=\"parquet_out\",\n                        help=\"Per-sector Parquet output\")\n    args = parser.parse_args()\n\n    logging.basicConfig(\n        level=logging.INFO,\n        format=\"%(asctime)s %(levelname)-8s %(message)s\",\n        datefmt=\"%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S\",\n    )\n    log = logging.getLogger(__name__)\n\n    # Load LIDO event type labels\n    lido_labels: dict[str, str] = {}\n    with open(args.lido, encoding=\"utf-8\", newline=\"\") as f:\n        for row in csv.DictReader(f):\n            lido_labels[row[\"resource\"]] = row[\"label\"]\n    log.info(\"Loaded %d LIDO labels from %s\", len(lido_labels), args.lido.name)\n\n    # Scan accumulators\n    local_emitted: dict[str, str]            = {}  # PROV-O shared nodes seen this run\n    new_prov_lines: list[str]               = []  # shared-node NQ descriptor lines\n    concept_labels_all: dict[str, str | None] = {}\n    agent_labels_all:   dict[str, str | None] = {}\n    parquet_rows: list[dict]                = []\n\n    db_conn = sqlite3.connect(str(args.db))\n    cur = db_conn.cursor()\n    cur.execute(\"SELECT COUNT(*) FROM objs\")\n    total = cur.fetchone()[0]\n    log.info(\"Scanning %s (%d records)\", args.db.name, total)\n\n    cur.execute(\"SELECT uid, bufgz FROM objs WHERE bufgz IS NOT NULL ORDER BY rowid\")\n    processed = errors = 0\n\n    for uid, blob in cur:\n        try:\n            data = json.loads(gzip.decompress(blob))\n        except Exception as exc:\n            log.warning(\"uid=%s decompress/parse error: %s\", uid, exc)\n            errors += 1\n            continue\n\n        props  = data.get(\"properties\") or {}\n        obj_id = props.get(\"item-id\") or uid\n        cho_uri = DDB_ITEM_BASE + obj_id\n        cho_subj_nt = f\"<{cho_uri}> \"  # per-record CHO subject prefix\n\n        # PROV-O: emit shared-node descriptor lines (skip per-CHO lines)\n        all_prov_lines = emit_prov_triples(data, cho_uri, GRAPH_PROV, local_emitted)\n        for line in all_prov_lines:\n            if not line.startswith(cho_subj_nt):\n                new_prov_lines.append(line)\n\n        # Parquet row + pending label dicts\n        try:\n            row, cpending, apending = extract_record(data, lido_labels)\n            parquet_rows.append(row)\n            for k, v in cpending.items():\n                concept_labels_all.setdefault(k, v)\n            for k, v in apending.items():\n                agent_labels_all.setdefault(k, v)\n        except Exception as exc:\n            log.warning(\"uid=%s extract error: %s\", uid, exc)\n            errors += 1\n\n        processed += 1\n        if processed % 100_000 == 0:\n            log.info(\"  %d / %d\", processed, total)\n\n    db_conn.close()\n    log.info(\"Scan complete: %d processed, %d errors\", processed, errors)\n\n    # After scan: local_emitted contains all PROV-O shared node URIs found\n    new_entities = dict(local_emitted)\n\n    # Lock-protected writes\n    log.info(\"Writing prov.duckdb + prov-shared.nq (%d shared nodes)\", len(new_entities))\n    _write_prov_db(args.prov_db, args.prov_out, new_entities, new_prov_lines)\n\n    log.info(\"Writing concept_labels.duckdb (%d URIs)\", len(concept_labels_all))\n    _write_labels_db(args.concept_labels_db, \"concept_labels\", concept_labels_all)\n\n    log.info(\"Writing agent_labels.duckdb (%d URIs)\", len(agent_labels_all))\n    _write_labels_db(args.agent_labels_db, \"agent_labels\", agent_labels_all)\n\n    log.info(\"Writing Parquet: %d rows → %s\", len(parquet_rows), args.parquet_out)\n    arrays = {col: [r.get(col) for r in parquet_rows] for col in PARQUET_SCHEMA.names}\n    table  = pa.table(arrays, schema=PARQUET_SCHEMA)\n    pq.write_table(table, str(args.parquet_out))\n\n    log.info(\"Done.\")\n\n\nif __name__ == \"__main__\":\n    main()\n"
```json
}
```

**Tool call:** `Write`
```json
{
  "file_path": "/Users/mta/Documents/claude/goethe-faust/scripts/transform/merge_parquet.py",
  "content": "\"\"\"\nPurpose:    Concatenate per-sector Parquet files from prescan.py into one combined file.\nUsage:      python -m transform merge_parquet --indir <dir> --out <file>\nInputs:     <dir>/*_meta.parquet  — per-sector Parquet files produced by prescan.py\nOutputs:    <file>                — combined Parquet (overwrites if present)\nDeps:       pyarrow\nAssumes:    All input files share the same schema (PARQUET_SCHEMA from prescan.py).\n\"\"\"\n\nfrom __future__ import annotations\n\nimport argparse\nimport logging\nfrom pathlib import Path\n\nimport pyarrow.parquet as pq\n\n\ndef main() -> None:\n    parser = argparse.ArgumentParser(description=\"Merge per-sector Parquet files\")\n    parser.add_argument(\"--indir\", type=Path, required=True,\n                        help=\"Directory containing *_meta.parquet files\")\n    parser.add_argument(\"--out\",   type=Path, required=True,\n                        help=\"Output combined Parquet file\")\n    args = parser.parse_args()\n\n    logging.basicConfig(\n        level=logging.INFO,\n        format=\"%(asctime)s %(levelname)-8s %(message)s\",\n        datefmt=\"%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S\",\n    )\n    log = logging.getLogger(__name__)\n\n    inputs = sorted(args.indir.glob(\"*_meta.parquet\"))\n    if not inputs:\n        log.error(\"No *_meta.parquet files found in %s\", args.indir)\n        raise SystemExit(1)\n\n    log.info(\"Merging %d files → %s\", len(inputs), args.out)\n    writer = None\n    total  = 0\n\n    for path in inputs:\n        tbl = pq.read_table(str(path))\n        if writer is None:\n            writer = pq.ParquetWriter(str(args.out), tbl.schema)\n        writer.write_table(tbl)\n        total += len(tbl)\n        log.info(\"  %s: %d rows\", path.name, len(tbl))\n\n    if writer:\n        writer.close()\n        log.info(\"Done: %d total rows → %s\", total, args.out)\n    else:\n        log.warning(\"No rows written.\")\n\n\nif __name__ == \"__main__\":\n    main()\n"
}
```

```json
{
  "replace_all": false,
  "file_path": "/Users/mta/Documents/claude/goethe-faust/scripts/run_gemea_transform.sh",
  "old_string": "echo \"[$(date '+%F %T')] Starting GeMeA transform (${MODE}) — 128 workers across 7 sectors\"",
  "new_string": "mkdir -p \"$PARQUET_DIR\"\n\n# ── Phase 0: prescan (parallel, one process per sector) ───────────────────────\necho \"[$(date '+%F %T')] Starting prescan phase (7 sectors in parallel)\"\nfor n in 1 2 3 4 5 6 7; do\n  (\n    echo \"[$(date '+%F %T')] [s${n}] prescan starting\"\n    cd \"$SCRIPTS\"\n    \"$PYTHON\" -m transform.prescan \\\n      --db                \"$SQLITE_DIR/s${n}.sqlite\" \\\n      --prov-db           \"$PROV_DB\" \\\n      --concept-labels-db \"$CONCEPT_LABELS_DB\" \\\n      --agent-labels-db   \"$AGENT_LABELS_DB\" \\\n      --lido              \"$CFG/lido_event_types.csv\" \\\n      --prov-out          \"$PROV_SHARED\" \\\n      --parquet-out       \"$PARQUET_DIR/s${n}_meta.parquet\"\n    echo \"[$(date '+%F %T')] [s${n}] prescan done\"\n  ) &\ndone\nwait\necho \"[$(date '+%F %T')] Prescan phase complete\"\n\n# optional: merge per-sector Parquet into one combined file\nif [[ -n \"${PARQUET_MERGE_ARG:-}\" ]]; then\n  echo \"[$(date '+%F %T')] Merging per-sector Parquet → $PARQUET_MERGE_ARG\"\n  cd \"$SCRIPTS\"\n  \"$PYTHON\" -m transform merge_parquet \\\n    --indir \"$PARQUET_DIR\" \\\n    --out   \"$PARQUET_MERGE_ARG\"\n  echo \"[$(date '+%F %T')] Parquet merge done\"\nfi\n# ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────\n\necho \"[$(date '+%F %T')] Starting GeMeA transform (${MODE}) — 128 workers across 7 sectors\""
}
```

```json
{
  "replace_all": false,
  "file_path": "/Users/mta/Documents/claude/gemea/scripts/py/export_ddb.py",
  "old_string": "def extract_meta(data: dict) -> dict:\n    \"\"\"Extract ProvidedCHO metadata for the Parquet row.\"\"\"\n    props = data.get(\"properties\", {})\n    rdf   = data.get(\"edm\", {}).get(\"RDF\") or {}\n    cho   = rdf.get(\"ProvidedCHO\") or {}\n    agg   = rdf.get(\"Aggregation\") or {}\n\n    # build Event and TimeSpan lookup for date extraction\n    events    = rdf.get(\"Event\") or []\n    if isinstance(events, dict):\n        events = [events]\n    timespans = rdf.get(\"TimeSpan\") or []\n    if isinstance(timespans, dict):\n        timespans = [timespans]\n    ts_map = {t[\"about\"]: t for t in timespans if isinstance(t, dict) and t.get(\"about\")}\n\n    # dc:date (normalised)\n    dc_date_raw = _scalar_values(cho.get(\"date\"))\n    dc_date, dc_date_qualifier = (None, None)\n    if dc_date_raw:\n        dc_date, dc_date_qualifier = parse_dc_date(dc_date_raw[0])\n\n    # dc_created via event chain\n    dc_created = []\n    for ev in events:\n        if not isinstance(ev, dict):\n            continue\n        ht = (ev.get(\"hasType\") or {})\n        ht_uri = ht.get(\"resource\") if isinstance(ht, dict) else None\n        if ht_uri not in LIDO_CREATED:\n            continue\n        oc = ev.get(\"occuredAt\")\n        if not oc:\n            continue\n        ts_ref = oc.get(\"resource\") if isinstance(oc, dict) else oc\n        ts = ts_map.get(ts_ref, {}) if isinstance(ts_ref, str) else {}\n        for key in (\"begin\", \"end\"):\n            vals = _scalar_values(ts.get(key))\n            dc_created.extend(vals)\n\n    # dc_issued via event chain + ProvidedCHO.issued\n    dc_issued = _scalar_values(cho.get(\"issued\"))\n    for ev in events:\n        if not isinstance(ev, dict):\n            continue\n        ht = (ev.get(\"hasType\") or {})\n        ht_uri = ht.get(\"resource\") if isinstance(ht, dict) else None\n        if ht_uri not in LIDO_ISSUED:\n            continue\n        oc = ev.get(\"occuredAt\")\n        if not oc:\n            continue\n        ts_ref = oc.get(\"resource\") if isinstance(oc, dict) else oc\n        ts = ts_map.get(ts_ref, {}) if isinstance(ts_ref, str) else {}\n        for key in (\"begin\", \"end\"):\n            vals = _scalar_values(ts.get(key))\n            dc_issued.extend(vals)\n\n    # agents via hasMet → Event.P11_had_participant\n    agents = []\n    hasMet = cho.get(\"hasMet\") or []\n    if isinstance(hasMet, dict):\n        hasMet = [hasMet]\n    event_map = {\n        e[\"about\"]: e for e in events\n        if isinstance(e, dict) and e.get(\"about\")\n    }\n    about_type_map = build_about_type_map(rdf)\n    for hm in hasMet:\n        if not isinstance(hm, dict):\n            continue\n        ev_ref = hm.get(\"resource\")\n        if not ev_ref:\n            continue\n        ev = event_map.get(ev_ref, {})\n        participants = ev.get(\"P11_had_participant\") or []\n        if isinstance(participants, dict):\n            participants = [participants]\n        for p in participants:\n            if not isinstance(p, dict):\n                continue\n            r = p.get(\"resource\")\n            if r:\n                et = about_type_map.get(r, \"Agent\")\n                node = to_named_node(r, et)\n                if node:\n                    agents.append(node.value)\n\n    # dc_publisher: ProvidedCHO.publisher + Aggregation.dataProvider\n    # dataProvider entries may be separate label/URI dicts in the same list, not paired\n    dp = agg.get(\"dataProvider\") or []\n    if isinstance(dp, dict):\n        dp = [dp]\n    publisher_structs = (\n        _agent_structs(cho.get(\"publisher\"), \"Agent\")\n        + _agent_structs(dp, \"Organization\")\n    )\n\n    return {\n        \"obj_id\":        props.get(\"item-id\", \"\"),\n        \"lang\":          cho.get(\"language\") or \"\",\n        \"title\":         (_scalar_values(cho.get(\"title\")) or [\"\"])[0],\n        \"dc_type\":       (_scalar_values(cho.get(\"dcType\")) or [\"\"])[0],\n        \"dc_creator\":    _agent_structs(cho.get(\"creator\"), \"Agent\"),\n        \"dc_contributor\": _agent_structs(cho.get(\"contributor\"), \"Agent\"),\n        \"dc_publisher\":  publisher_structs,\n        \"dc_subject\":       _scalar_values(cho.get(\"dcSubject\")),\n        \"dc_subject_uris\":  _resource_values(cho.get(\"dcTermsSubject\"), \"Concept\"),\n        \"dc_date\":          dc_date,\n        \"dc_date_qualifier\": dc_date_qualifier,\n        \"dc_issued\":        dc_issued,\n        \"dc_created\":       dc_created,\n        \"agents\":           agents,\n        \"hierarchy_type\":   (_scalar_values(cho.get(\"hierarchyType\")) or [None])[0],\n        \"is_part_of\":       bool(cho.get(\"isPartOf\")),\n    }",
  "new_string": "_DDB_VOCNET = \"http://ddb.vocnet.org/\"\n_BARE_ID_RE = re.compile(r'^[A-Z0-9]{32}$')\n_QUALIFIER_RE = re.compile(r'\\([^)]*\\)')\n\n\ndef _is_ext_uri(resource: str) -> bool:\n    return bool(resource) and resource.startswith(\"http\") and not _BARE_ID_RE.match(resource)\n\n\ndef _parse_dc_date(raw: str) -> str | None:\n    if not raw:\n        return None\n    clean = _QUALIFIER_RE.sub(\"\", raw).strip().strip(\"[]\").strip()\n    if not clean:\n        return None\n    m = re.match(r'^(\\d{8})$', clean)\n    if m:\n        s = m.group(1)\n        return f\"{s[:4]}-{s[4:6]}-{s[6:]}\"\n    if clean and clean[0].isdigit():\n        return clean\n    m2 = re.search(r'\\d{4}', clean)\n    return m2.group(0) if m2 else None\n\n\ndef _build_concept_labels_map(rdf: dict) -> dict[str, str]:\n    result: dict[str, str] = {}\n    concepts = rdf.get(\"Concept\") or []\n    if isinstance(concepts, dict):\n        concepts = [concepts]\n    for c in concepts:\n        if not isinstance(c, dict):\n            continue\n        about = (c.get(\"about\") or \"\").strip()\n        if not about:\n            continue\n        pref = c.get(\"prefLabel\")\n        if isinstance(pref, list):\n            pref = pref[0] if pref else None\n        if isinstance(pref, dict):\n            label = pref.get(\"$\") or \"\"\n        elif isinstance(pref, str):\n            label = pref\n        else:\n            continue\n        if label:\n            result[about] = label\n    return result\n\n\ndef _new_agent_list(field_val, agent_type: str) -> list[dict]:\n    \"\"\"Convert creator/contributor/publisher field to {name, type, is_ext_uri} structs.\"\"\"\n    out: list[dict] = []\n    items = field_val if isinstance(field_val, list) else ([field_val] if field_val else [])\n    for v in items:\n        if isinstance(v, dict):\n            name = v.get(\"$\") or \"\"\n            res  = v.get(\"resource\") or \"\"\n            ext  = _is_ext_uri(res)\n            if name or res:\n                out.append({\"name\": name, \"type\": agent_type, \"is_ext_uri\": ext})\n        elif isinstance(v, str) and v:\n            out.append({\"name\": v, \"type\": agent_type, \"is_ext_uri\": False})\n    return out\n\n\ndef _timespan_to_date(ts: dict, date_type: str) -> dict | None:\n    def sv(f):\n        vals = _scalar_values(ts.get(f))\n        return vals[0] if vals else None\n    ts_begin = sv(\"begin\")\n    ts_end   = sv(\"end\")\n    if ts_begin is None and ts_end is None:\n        pref = sv(\"prefLabel\")\n        return {\"value\": pref, \"begin\": None, \"end\": None, \"type\": date_type} if pref else None\n    if ts_begin and ts_end and ts_begin == ts_end:\n        return {\"value\": ts_begin, \"begin\": None, \"end\": None, \"type\": date_type}\n    return {\"value\": None, \"begin\": ts_begin, \"end\": ts_end, \"type\": date_type}\n\n\ndef extract_meta(data: dict) -> dict:\n    \"\"\"Extract ProvidedCHO metadata for the Parquet row.\"\"\"\n    props     = data.get(\"properties\", {})\n    prov_info = data.get(\"provider-info\") or {}\n    rdf       = data.get(\"edm\", {}).get(\"RDF\") or {}\n    cho       = rdf.get(\"ProvidedCHO\") or {}\n    if isinstance(cho, list):\n        cho = cho[0] if cho else {}\n\n    events    = rdf.get(\"Event\") or []\n    if isinstance(events, dict):\n        events = [events]\n    timespans = rdf.get(\"TimeSpan\") or []\n    if isinstance(timespans, dict):\n        timespans = [timespans]\n    ts_map = {t[\"about\"]: t for t in timespans if isinstance(t, dict) and t.get(\"about\")}\n\n    concept_labels = _build_concept_labels_map(rdf)\n\n    # -- title + lang_title --\n    title_raw  = cho.get(\"title\")\n    title_str  = \"\"\n    lang_title = \"\"\n    if isinstance(title_raw, list):\n        title_raw = title_raw[0] if title_raw else None\n    if isinstance(title_raw, dict):\n        title_str  = title_raw.get(\"$\") or \"\"\n        lang_title = title_raw.get(\"lang\") or \"\"\n    elif isinstance(title_raw, str):\n        title_str = title_raw\n\n    # -- lang_obj --\n    lang_obj_raw = cho.get(\"language\") or cho.get(\"dcTermsLanguage\")\n    lang_obj = (_scalar_values(lang_obj_raw) or [\"\"])[0]\n\n    # -- dc_type labels --\n    dc_type_labels: list[str] = []\n    dc_type_raw = cho.get(\"dcType\") or []\n    if not isinstance(dc_type_raw, list):\n        dc_type_raw = [dc_type_raw]\n    for v in dc_type_raw:\n        if isinstance(v, dict):\n            lit = v.get(\"$\") or \"\"\n            res = v.get(\"resource\") or \"\"\n            if lit:\n                dc_type_labels.append(lit)\n            elif res and not res.startswith(_DDB_VOCNET) and _is_ext_uri(res):\n                label = concept_labels.get(res)\n                if label:\n                    dc_type_labels.append(label)\n        elif isinstance(v, str) and v:\n            dc_type_labels.append(v)\n\n    # -- dc_subject structs --\n    dc_subj: list[dict] = []\n    for key in (\"dcSubject\", \"dcTermsSubject\", \"dcTermSubject\"):\n        items = cho.get(key) or []\n        if not isinstance(items, list):\n            items = [items]\n        for v in items:\n            if isinstance(v, dict):\n                lit = v.get(\"$\") or \"\"\n                res = v.get(\"resource\") or \"\"\n                if lit:\n                    dc_subj.append({\"name\": lit, \"is_ext_uri\": False})\n                elif res and _is_ext_uri(res) and not res.startswith(_DDB_VOCNET):\n                    label = concept_labels.get(res)\n                    if label:\n                        dc_subj.append({\"name\": label, \"is_ext_uri\": True})\n            elif isinstance(v, str) and v and not _BARE_ID_RE.match(v):\n                dc_subj.append({\"name\": v, \"is_ext_uri\": False})\n\n    # -- agents unified --\n    # LIDO participants\n    lido_agents: list[dict] = []\n    hasMet = cho.get(\"hasMet\") or []\n    if isinstance(hasMet, dict):\n        hasMet = [hasMet]\n    event_map = {e[\"about\"]: e for e in events if isinstance(e, dict) and e.get(\"about\")}\n    about_type_map = build_about_type_map(rdf)\n    for hm in hasMet:\n        if not isinstance(hm, dict):\n            continue\n        ev_ref = hm.get(\"resource\")\n        if not ev_ref:\n            continue\n        ev = event_map.get(ev_ref, {})\n        participants = ev.get(\"P11_had_participant\") or []\n        if isinstance(participants, dict):\n            participants = [participants]\n        for p in participants:\n            if not isinstance(p, dict):\n                continue\n            r = p.get(\"resource\") or \"\"\n            lit = p.get(\"$\") or \"\"\n            if r:\n                et = about_type_map.get(r, \"Agent\")\n                node = to_named_node(r, et)\n                name = lit or (node.value if node else \"\")\n                ext  = _is_ext_uri(r)\n                lido_agents.append({\"name\": name, \"type\": \"unknown_event\", \"is_ext_uri\": ext})\n\n    agents = (\n        _new_agent_list(cho.get(\"creator\"),     \"creation\")\n        + _new_agent_list(cho.get(\"publisher\"), \"publication\")\n        + _new_agent_list(cho.get(\"contributor\"), \"contribution\")\n        + lido_agents\n    )\n\n    # -- dates unified --\n    dates: list[dict] = []\n    dc_date_raw2 = _scalar_values(cho.get(\"date\"))\n    if dc_date_raw2:\n        normed = _parse_dc_date(dc_date_raw2[0])\n        if normed:\n            dates.append({\"value\": normed, \"begin\": None, \"end\": None, \"type\": \"unknown_event\"})\n    for val in _scalar_values(cho.get(\"created\")):\n        dates.append({\"value\": val, \"begin\": None, \"end\": None, \"type\": \"creation\"})\n    for val in _scalar_values(cho.get(\"issued\")):\n        dates.append({\"value\": val, \"begin\": None, \"end\": None, \"type\": \"publication\"})\n    for ev in events:\n        if not isinstance(ev, dict):\n            continue\n        ht = (ev.get(\"hasType\") or {})\n        ht_uri = ht.get(\"resource\") if isinstance(ht, dict) else None\n        for lido_set, dtype in ((LIDO_CREATED, \"creation\"), (LIDO_ISSUED, \"publication\")):\n            if ht_uri not in lido_set:\n                continue\n            oc = ev.get(\"occuredAt\") or ev.get(\"occurredAt\")\n            if not oc:\n                continue\n            ts_ref = oc.get(\"resource\") if isinstance(oc, dict) else oc\n            ts = ts_map.get(ts_ref, {}) if isinstance(ts_ref, str) else {}\n            d = _timespan_to_date(ts, dtype)\n            if d:\n                dates.append(d)\n\n    # -- mediatype / sector (int16) --\n    mediatype: int | None = None\n    sector:    int | None = None\n    concepts_list = rdf.get(\"Concept\") or []\n    if isinstance(concepts_list, dict):\n        concepts_list = [concepts_list]\n    for c in concepts_list:\n        if not isinstance(c, dict):\n            continue\n        about = c.get(\"about\") or \"\"\n        if mediatype is None and \"/medientyp/mt\" in about:\n            try:\n                mediatype = int(about.rsplit(\"/mt\", 1)[-1])\n            except ValueError:\n                pass\n        if sector is None and \"/sparte/sparte\" in about:\n            try:\n                sector = int(about.rsplit(\"/sparte\", 1)[-1])\n            except ValueError:\n                pass\n\n    # -- hierarchy_type (int16) --\n    raw_ht = (_scalar_values(cho.get(\"hierarchyType\")) or [None])[0]\n    htype: int | None = None\n    if raw_ht:\n        try:\n            htype = int(raw_ht.replace(\"htype_\", \"\"))\n        except ValueError:\n            pass\n\n    return {\n        \"obj_id\":         props.get(\"item-id\", \"\"),\n        \"title\":          title_str,\n        \"lang_title\":     lang_title,\n        \"lang_obj\":       lang_obj,\n        \"provider_id\":    prov_info.get(\"provider-ddb-id\", \"\"),\n        \"dataset_id\":     props.get(\"dataset-id\", \"\"),\n        \"dc_type\":        dc_type_labels,\n        \"agents\":         agents,\n        \"dates\":          dates,\n        \"dc_subject\":     dc_subj,\n        \"hierarchy_type\": htype,\n        \"mediatype\":      mediatype,\n        \"sector\":         sector,\n        \"is_part_of\":     bool(cho.get(\"isPartOf\")),\n    }"
}
```

2. Key Technical Concepts:
   - Two-pass pipeline: Pass 1 (prescan, sequential per sector) pre-populates shared DuckDBs; Pass 2 (transform workers) reads read-only
   - DuckDB single-writer constraint → solved by prescan using `fcntl.flock` locks per DB file
   - Three shared DuckDB files: `prov.duckdb` (prov_entities), `concept_labels.duckdb`, `agent_labels.duckdb`
   - PROV-O Layer 1 (Without-Activity pattern): shared node types are dataset, XSLT, provider, DDB agent
   - URN short-prefix scheme: `urn:ddbedm:dataset:<id>`, `urn:ddbedm:xslt:<ver>`, `urn:ddbedm:provider:<id>`
   - `prov-shared.nq` — N-Quads with graph `https://gemea.ise.fiz-karlsruhe.de/graph/prov`; idempotent: only writes truly-new URIs (not already in prov.duckdb)
   - New PARQUET_SCHEMA fields: AGENT_STRUCT `(name: string, type: string, is_ext_uri: bool)`, DATE_STRUCT `(value: string, begin: string, end: string, type: string)`, SUBJECT_STRUCT `(name: string, is_ext_uri: bool)`
   - Agent type vocabulary: `creation`, `publication`, `contribution` (for dc:creator/publisher/contributor), LIDO label from `lido_event_types.csv` for hasMet participants
   - Date type vocabulary: `creation`, `publication`, `unknown_event`
   - TimeSpan: begin == end → point-in-time `{value: begin, begin: None, end: None}`; begin ≠ end → range `{value: None, begin: begin, end: end}`
   - `mediatype`/`sector`/`hierarchy_type` stored as `pa.int16()` (numeric suffix only: `mt002`→2, `sparte006`→6, `htype_015`→15)
   - `lang_title`: language tag from `ProvidedCHO.title.lang`; `lang_obj`: from `dc:language`/`dcterms:language`
   - `provider_id`: from `provider-info.provider-ddb-id`; `dataset_id`: from `properties.dataset-id`
   - `is_ext_uri`: True if resource starts with "http" and is not a 32-char bare DDB ID (`_BARE_ID_RE = re.compile(r'^[A-Z0-9]{32})`)
   - DDB vocnet URIs (`http://ddb.vocnet.org/`) skipped from dc_type / dc_subject (handled by mediatype/sector fields)
   - dcTermSubject (typo variant present in corpus) scanned alongside dcTermsSubject and dcSubject
   - `INSERT OR IGNORE` for idempotent DuckDB writes; first non-null label seen wins
   - prescan.py imported as `python -m transform.prescan` (relative imports from `.emitters`, `.constants`, `.utils`)

     ```python
     ])

         pa.field("begin", pa.string()),
         pa.field("end",   pa.string()),
         pa.field("type",  pa.string()),
     ])
     SUBJECT_STRUCT = pa.struct([
         pa.field("name", pa.string()),
         pa.field("is_ext_uri", pa.bool_()),
     ])
     PARQUET_SCHEMA = pa.schema([
         ("obj_id", pa.string()), ("title", pa.string()),
         ("lang_title", pa.string()), ("lang_obj", pa.string()),
         ("provider_id", pa.string()), ("dataset_id", pa.string()),
         ("dc_type", pa.list_(pa.string())),
         ("agents", pa.list_(AGENT_STRUCT)),
     ```

     ```python
     # Reads *_meta.parquet from --indir, concatenates to --out using ParquetWriter
     def main():
         inputs = sorted(args.indir.glob("*_meta.parquet"))
         writer = None
         for path in inputs:
             tbl = pq.read_table(str(path))
             if writer is None:
                 writer = pq.ParquetWriter(str(args.out), tbl.schema)
             writer.write_table(tbl)
         if writer:
             writer.close()
     ```

4. Errors and fixes:
   - **Parquet append design flip-flop**: User approved `--parquet-append PATH` (combined path), then changed to `--parquet-out` + `--parquet-append` boolean, then rejected locking for the Parquet file entirely ("overkill — no parallel runs"). Final resolution: reverted to per-sector `--parquet-out` + separate `merge_parquet.py` script (no locking needed).
   - **`_resolve_subject_items` redundant coerce_list**: In the draft, there was a redundant `coerce_list(field_val) if isinstance(...) else coerce_list(field_val)` pattern. Simplified to just `for v in coerce_list(field_val):`.
   - **LIDO agent type in export_ddb.py**: `export_ddb.py` doesn't load `lido_event_types.csv` (standalone script), so LIDO participant `type` is set to `"unknown_event"` as fallback instead of the full LIDO label lookup. Only `prescan.py` gets the full lido labels via `--lido`.

5. Problem Solving:
   - **Concurrent DuckDB writes**: Solved by two-pass architecture — prescan does all shared DB writes under `fcntl.flock`; transform workers open `prov.duckdb` read-only and never write back.
   - **Duplicate `.nq` lines on re-runs**: Solved by pre-checking which URIs are already in the DB (`SELECT uri FROM prov_entities WHERE uri IN (...)`), computing `truly_new`, and only appending `.nq` lines whose subject NQ-form is in `truly_new_nts`.
   - **Filtering per-CHO vs shared-node NQ lines**: `emit_prov_triples` returns mixed lines. Prescan filters by checking `line.startswith(f"<{cho_uri}> ")` — per-record CHO lines have the CHO URI as subject; shared node lines have the dataset/XSLT/provider URI as subject.
   - **Table initialization race**: Solved by always running `CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS` inside the lock block (only one process holds the lock at a time, so first writer creates the table).
   - **`export_ddb.py` doesn't know LIDO labels**: Accepted limitation — LIDO participant `type` = `"unknown_event"` in export_ddb.py. Full labels only in prescan.py.

```
1	#!/usr/bin/env python3
2	from __future__ import annotations
3	# Purpose:      Re-export only the Parquet metadata from a sector sqlite, skipping NT generation.
4	#               Use this to rebuild <stem>_meta.parquet after schema changes without re-running
5	#               the full export_ddb.py pipeline.
6	# Usage:        python3 export_ddb_parquet.py <sector>.sqlite
7	# Inputs:       <sector>.sqlite — table objs, column bufgz (gzip-compressed cortex JSON)
8	# Outputs:      $OUTPUT_DIR/<stem>_meta.parquet
9	# Dependencies: pyarrow
10	# Assumptions:  Run from project root; .venv exists
11	
12	import gzip
13	import json
14	import logging
15	import multiprocessing
16	import os
17	import queue
18	import sqlite3

20	import traceback

23	import pyarrow as pa
24	import pyarrow.parquet as pq
25	
26	# Re-use schema constants and internal helpers from export_ddb.
27	# extract_meta is redefined below with the dc_created fix.
28	sys.path.insert(0, str(Path(__file__).parent))
29	from export_ddb import (
30	    PARQUET_SCHEMA,
31	    REPORT_INTERVAL,
32	    WORKER_REPORT_INTERVAL,
33	    LIDO_CREATED,
34	    LIDO_ISSUED,
35	    parse_dc_date,
36	    build_about_type_map,
37	    to_named_node,
38	    _scalar_values,
39	    _agent_structs,
40	    _resource_values,
41	    _iter_json,
42	)
43	
44	
45	def extract_meta(data: dict) -> dict:
46	    """Extract ProvidedCHO metadata for the Parquet row.
47	
48	    Fixes vs. export_ddb.extract_meta:
49	      - dc_created: read dcterms:created from ProvidedCHO directly first,
50	        then extend with LIDO creation-event chain.
51	      - dc_issued:  read dcterms:issued from ProvidedCHO directly first (was
52	        already done), then extend with LIDO publication-event chain.
53	    Both are now consistent: direct ProvidedCHO field → hasMet traversal.
54	    """
55	    props = data.get("properties", {})
56	    rdf   = data.get("edm", {}).get("RDF") or {}
57	    cho   = rdf.get("ProvidedCHO") or {}
58	    agg   = rdf.get("Aggregation") or {}
59	
60	    # build Event and TimeSpan lookup for date extraction
61	    events = rdf.get("Event") or []
62	    if isinstance(events, dict):
63	        events = [events]
64	    timespans = rdf.get("TimeSpan") or []
65	    if isinstance(timespans, dict):
66	        timespans = [timespans]
67	    ts_map = {t["about"]: t for t in timespans if isinstance(t, dict) and t.get("about")}
68	
69	    # dc:date (normalised)
70	    dc_date_raw = _scalar_values(cho.get("date"))
71	    dc_date, dc_date_qualifier = (None, None)
72	    if dc_date_raw:
73	        dc_date, dc_date_qualifier = parse_dc_date(dc_date_raw[0])
74	
75	    # dc_created: ProvidedCHO.dcterms:created first, then hasMet traversal
76	    dc_created = _scalar_values(cho.get("created"))
77	    for ev in events:
78	        if not isinstance(ev, dict):
79	            continue
80	        ht = (ev.get("hasType") or {})
81	        ht_uri = ht.get("resource") if isinstance(ht, dict) else None
82	        if ht_uri not in LIDO_CREATED:
83	            continue
84	        oc = ev.get("occuredAt")
85	        if not oc:
86	            continue
87	        ts_ref = oc.get("resource") if isinstance(oc, dict) else oc
88	        ts = ts_map.get(ts_ref, {}) if isinstance(ts_ref, str) else {}
89	        for key in ("begin", "end"):
90	            dc_created.extend(_scalar_values(ts.get(key)))
91	
92	    # dc_issued: ProvidedCHO.dcterms:issued first, then hasMet traversal
93	    dc_issued = _scalar_values(cho.get("issued"))
94	    for ev in events:
95	        if not isinstance(ev, dict):
96	            continue
97	        ht = (ev.get("hasType") or {})
98	        ht_uri = ht.get("resource") if isinstance(ht, dict) else None
99	        if ht_uri not in LIDO_ISSUED:
100	            continue
101	        oc = ev.get("occuredAt")
102	        if not oc:
103	            continue
104	        ts_ref = oc.get("resource") if isinstance(oc, dict) else oc
105	        ts = ts_map.get(ts_ref, {}) if isinstance(ts_ref, str) else {}
106	        for key in ("begin", "end"):
107	            dc_issued.extend(_scalar_values(ts.get(key)))
108	
109	    # agents via hasMet → Event.P11_had_participant
110	    agents = []
111	    hasMet = cho.get("hasMet") or []
112	    if isinstance(hasMet, dict):
113	        hasMet = [hasMet]
114	    event_map = {
115	        e["about"]: e for e in events
116	        if isinstance(e, dict) and e.get("about")
117	    }
118	    about_type_map = build_about_type_map(rdf)
119	    for hm in hasMet:
120	        if not isinstance(hm, dict):
121	            continue
122	        ev_ref = hm.get("resource")
123	        if not ev_ref:
124	            continue
125	        ev = event_map.get(ev_ref, {})
126	        participants = ev.get("P11_had_participant") or []
127	        if isinstance(participants, dict):
128	            participants = [participants]
129	        for p in participants:
130	            if not isinstance(p, dict):
131	                continue
132	            r = p.get("resource")
133	            if r:
134	                et = about_type_map.get(r, "Agent")
135	                node = to_named_node(r, et)
136	                if node:
137	                    agents.append(node.value)
138	
139	    # dc_publisher: ProvidedCHO.publisher + Aggregation.dataProvider
140	    dp = agg.get("dataProvider") or []
141	    if isinstance(dp, dict):
142	        dp = [dp]
143	    publisher_structs = (
144	        _agent_structs(cho.get("publisher"), "Agent")
145	        + _agent_structs(dp, "Organization")
146	    )
147	
148	    return {
149	        "obj_id":            props.get("item-id", ""),
150	        "lang":              cho.get("language") or "",
151	        "title":             (_scalar_values(cho.get("title")) or [""])[0],
152	        "dc_type":           (_scalar_values(cho.get("dcType")) or [""])[0],
153	        "dc_creator":        _agent_structs(cho.get("creator"), "Agent"),
154	        "dc_contributor":    _agent_structs(cho.get("contributor"), "Agent"),
155	        "dc_publisher":      publisher_structs,
156	        "dc_subject":        _scalar_values(cho.get("dcSubject")),
157	        "dc_subject_uris":   _resource_values(cho.get("dcTermsSubject"), "Concept"),
158	        "dc_date":           dc_date,
159	        "dc_date_qualifier": dc_date_qualifier,
160	        "dc_issued":         dc_issued,
161	        "dc_created":        dc_created,
162	        "agents":            agents,
163	        "hierarchy_type":    (_scalar_values(cho.get("hierarchyType")) or [None])[0],
164	        "is_part_of":        bool(cho.get("isPartOf")),
165	    }
166	
167	OUTPUT_DIR    = os.environ.get("OUTPUT_DIR", "./out")
168	MAX_WORKERS   = int(os.environ.get("MAX_WORKERS", max(1, multiprocessing.cpu_count() - 2)))
169	PARQUET_CHUNK = int(os.environ.get("PARQUET_CHUNK", 500_000))
170	
171	logging.basicConfig(
172	    level=logging.INFO,
173	    format="%(asctime)s %(levelname)-8s %(message)s",
174	    datefmt="%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S",
175	)
176	
177	
178	# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
179	# Worker
180	# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
181	
182	def worker(
183	    worker_id: int,
184	    work_q: multiprocessing.Queue,
185	    meta_q: multiprocessing.Queue,
186	    compressed: bool = True,
187	) -> None:
188	    processed = 0
189	    batch: list[dict] = []
190	
191	    def flush():
192	        if not batch:
193	            return
194	        meta_q.put(list(batch))
195	        batch.clear()
196	
197	    while True:
198	        item = work_q.get()
199	        if item is None:
200	            flush()
201	            break
202	        uid, blob = item
203	        try:
204	            data = json.loads(gzip.decompress(blob) if compressed else blob)
205	            batch.append(extract_meta(data))
206	            processed += 1
207	        except Exception:
208	            traceback.print_exc()
209	            continue
210	
211	        if processed % WORKER_REPORT_INTERVAL == 0:
212	            logging.info(f"Worker {worker_id}: processed {processed:,} records")
213	
214	        if len(batch) >= 10_000:
215	            flush()
216	
217	
218	# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
219	# Meta writer
220	# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
221	
222	def meta_writer(meta_q: multiprocessing.Queue, output_path: str) -> None:
223	    tmp_path = output_path + ".tmp"
224	    writer = None
225	    total = 0
226	    buffer: list[dict] = []
227	
228	    def flush():
229	        nonlocal writer, total
230	        if not buffer:
231	            return
232	        arrays = {col: [row.get(col) for row in buffer] for col in PARQUET_SCHEMA.names}
233	        table = pa.table(arrays, schema=PARQUET_SCHEMA)
234	        if writer is None:
235	            writer = pq.ParquetWriter(tmp_path, PARQUET_SCHEMA)
236	        writer.write_table(table)
237	        total += len(buffer)
238	        buffer.clear()
239	
240	    while True:
241	        try:
242	            batch = meta_q.get(timeout=5)
243	        except queue.Empty:
244	            continue
245	        if batch is None:
246	            break
247	        buffer.extend(batch)
248	        if len(buffer) >= PARQUET_CHUNK:
249	            flush()
250	
251	    flush()
252	    if writer:
253	        writer.close()
254	        Path(tmp_path).rename(output_path)
255	        logging.info(f"Parquet writer: {total:,} rows written → {output_path}")
256	    else:
257	        logging.warning("Parquet writer: no rows written")
258	
259	
260	# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
261	# Main
262	# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
263	
264	def main() -> None:
265	    if len(sys.argv) != 2:
266	        print(f"Usage: {sys.argv[0]} <input.sqlite|input.json>", file=sys.stderr)
267	        sys.exit(1)
268	
269	    input_path = sys.argv[1]
270	    is_json    = Path(input_path).suffix.lower() == ".json"
271	    compressed = not is_json
272	
273	    Path(OUTPUT_DIR).mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
274	    stem         = Path(input_path).stem
275	    parquet_path = str(Path(OUTPUT_DIR) / f"{stem}_meta.parquet")
276	
277	    logging.info(f"Workers: {MAX_WORKERS}")
278	    logging.info(f"Output: {parquet_path}")
279	
280	    work_q = multiprocessing.Queue(MAX_WORKERS * 4)
281	    meta_q = multiprocessing.Queue(1000)
282	
283	    workers = [
284	        multiprocessing.Process(target=worker, args=(i, work_q, meta_q, compressed), daemon=True)
285	        for i in range(MAX_WORKERS)
286	    ]
287	    for w in workers:
288	        w.start()
289	
290	    writer_proc = multiprocessing.Process(
291	        target=meta_writer, args=(meta_q, parquet_path), daemon=True
292	    )
293	    writer_proc.start()
294	
295	    count = 0
296	
297	    if is_json:
298	        records = list(_iter_json(input_path))
299	        total   = len(records)
300	        logging.info(f"Processing {total:,} records from {input_path}")
301	        for uid, blob in records:
302	            work_q.put((uid, blob))
303	            count += 1
304	            if count % REPORT_INTERVAL == 0:
305	                logging.info(f"Queued {count:,} / {total:,}")
306	    else:
307	        db = sqlite3.connect(input_path)
308	        cur = db.cursor()
309	        cur.execute("SELECT max(rowid) FROM objs")
310	        total = cur.fetchone()[0] or 0
311	        logging.info(f"Processing ~{total:,} records from {input_path}")
312	
313	        cur.execute("SELECT uid, bufgz FROM objs WHERE bufgz IS NOT NULL ORDER BY rowid")
314	        for uid, blob in cur:
315	            work_q.put((uid, blob))
316	            count += 1
317	            if count % REPORT_INTERVAL == 0:
318	                logging.info(f"Queued {count:,} / ~{total:,}")
319	
320	    for _ in range(MAX_WORKERS):
321	        work_q.put(None)
322	
323	    for w in workers:
324	        w.join()
325	
326	    meta_q.put(None)
327	    writer_proc.join()
328	
329	    logging.info(f"Done. {count:,} records processed.")
330	
331	
332	if __name__ == "__main__":
333	    main()
334	
```

```
2	from __future__ import annotations
3	# Purpose:      Export any DDB sector sqlite to batched N-Triples (full EDM graph) and a

6	# Inputs:       <sector>.sqlite — table objs, column bufgz (gzip-compressed cortex JSON)

8	#               $OUTPUT_DIR/<stem>_meta.parquet                         — metadata Parquet
9	# Dependencies: pyoxigraph, pyarrow
```

```
519	_BARE_ID_RE = re.compile(r'^[A-Z0-9]{32}$')
520	_QUALIFIER_RE = re.compile(r'\([^)]*\)')
521	
522	
523	def _is_ext_uri(resource: str) -> bool:
524	    return bool(resource) and resource.startswith("http") and not _BARE_ID_RE.match(resource)
525	
526	
527	def _parse_dc_date(raw: str) -> str | None:
528	    if not raw:
529	        return None
530	    clean = _QUALIFIER_RE.sub("", raw).strip().strip("[]").strip()
531	    if not clean:
532	        return None
533	    m = re.match(r'^(\d{8})$', clean)
534	    if m:
535	        s = m.group(1)
536	        return f"{s[:4]}-{s[4:6]}-{s[6:]}"
537	    if clean and clean[0].isdigit():
538	        return clean
539	    m2 = re.search(r'\d{4}', clean)
540	    return m2.group(0) if m2 else None
541	
542	
543	def _build_concept_labels_map(rdf: dict) -> dict[str, str]:
544	    result: dict[str, str] = {}
545	    concepts = rdf.get("Concept") or []
546	    if isinstance(concepts, dict):
547	        concepts = [concepts]
548	    for c in concepts:
549	        if not isinstance(c, dict):
550	            continue
551	        about = (c.get("about") or "").strip()
552	        if not about:
553	            continue
554	        pref = c.get("prefLabel")
555	        if isinstance(pref, list):
556	            pref = pref[0] if pref else None
557	        if isinstance(pref, dict):
558	            label = pref.get("$") or ""
559	        elif isinstance(pref, str):
560	            label = pref
561	        else:
562	            continue
563	        if label:
564	            result[about] = label
565	    return result
566	
567	
568	def _new_agent_list(field_val, agent_type: str) -> list[dict]:
569	    """Convert creator/contributor/publisher field to {name, type, is_ext_uri} structs."""
570	    out: list[dict] = []
571	    items = field_val if isinstance(field_val, list) else ([field_val] if field_val else [])
572	    for v in items:
573	        if isinstance(v, dict):
574	            name = v.get("$") or ""
575	            res  = v.get("resource") or ""
576	            ext  = _is_ext_uri(res)
577	            if name or res:
578	                out.append({"name": name, "type": agent_type, "is_ext_uri": ext})
579	        elif isinstance(v, str) and v:
580	            out.append({"name": v, "type": agent_type, "is_ext_uri": False})
581	    return out
582	
583	
584	def _timespan_to_date(ts: dict, date_type: str) -> dict | None:
585	    def sv(f):
586	        vals = _scalar_values(ts.get(f))
587	        return vals[0] if vals else None
588	    ts_begin = sv("begin")
589	    ts_end   = sv("end")
590	    if ts_begin is None and ts_end is None:
591	        pref = sv("prefLabel")
592	        return {"value": pref, "begin": None, "end": None, "type": date_type} if pref else None
593	    if ts_begin and ts_end and ts_begin == ts_end:
594	        return {"value": ts_begin, "begin": None, "end": None, "type": date_type}
595	    return {"value": None, "begin": ts_begin, "end": ts_end, "type": date_type}
596	
597	
598	def extract_meta(data: dict) -> dict:
599	    """Extract ProvidedCHO metadata for the Parquet row."""
600	    props     = data.get("properties", {})
601	    prov_info = data.get("provider-info") or {}
602	    rdf       = data.get("edm", {}).get("RDF") or {}
603	    cho       = rdf.get("ProvidedCHO") or {}

606	
607	    events    = rdf.get("Event") or []

623	    if isinstance(title_raw, dict):

625	        lang_title = title_raw.get("lang") or ""
626	    elif isinstance(title_raw, str):

628
```

```
787	def _iter_json(path: str):
788	    """Yield (uid, json_bytes) for each record in a JSON array or JSON Lines file."""
```

```json
  "old_string": "def extract_meta(data: dict) -> dict:\n    \"\"\"Extract ProvidedCHO metadata for the Parquet row.\n\n    Fixes vs. export_ddb.extract_meta:\n      - dc_created: read dcterms:created from ProvidedCHO directly first,\n        then extend with LIDO creation-event chain.\n      - dc_issued:  read dcterms:issued from ProvidedCHO directly first (was\n        already done), then extend with LIDO publication-event chain.\n    Both are now consistent: direct ProvidedCHO field → hasMet traversal.\n    \"\"\"\n    props = data.get(\"properties\", {})\n    rdf   = data.get(\"edm\", {}).get(\"RDF\") or {}\n    cho   = rdf.get(\"ProvidedCHO\") or {}\n    agg   = rdf.get(\"Aggregation\") or {}\n\n    # build Event and TimeSpan lookup for date extraction\n    events = rdf.get(\"Event\") or []\n    if isinstance(events, dict):\n        events = [events]\n    timespans = rdf.get(\"TimeSpan\") or []\n    if isinstance(timespans, dict):\n        timespans = [timespans]\n    ts_map = {t[\"about\"]: t for t in timespans if isinstance(t, dict) and t.get(\"about\")}\n\n    # dc:date (normalised)\n    dc_date_raw = _scalar_values(cho.get(\"date\"))\n    dc_date, dc_date_qualifier = (None, None)\n    if dc_date_raw:\n        dc_date, dc_date_qualifier = parse_dc_date(dc_date_raw[0])\n\n    # dc_created: ProvidedCHO.dcterms:created first, then hasMet traversal\n    dc_created = _scalar_values(cho.get(\"created\"))\n    for ev in events:\n        if not isinstance(ev, dict):\n            continue\n        ht = (ev.get(\"hasType\") or {})\n        ht_uri = ht.get(\"resource\") if isinstance(ht, dict) else None\n        if ht_uri not in LIDO_CREATED:\n            continue\n        oc = ev.get(\"occuredAt\")\n        if not oc:\n            continue\n        ts_ref = oc.get(\"resource\") if isinstance(oc, dict) else oc\n        ts = ts_map.get(ts_ref, {}) if isinstance(ts_ref, str) else {}\n        for key in (\"begin\", \"end\"):\n            dc_created.extend(_scalar_values(ts.get(key)))\n\n    # dc_issued: ProvidedCHO.dcterms:issued first, then hasMet traversal\n    dc_issued = _scalar_values(cho.get(\"issued\"))\n    for ev in events:\n        if not isinstance(ev, dict):\n            continue\n        ht = (ev.get(\"hasType\") or {})\n        ht_uri = ht.get(\"resource\") if isinstance(ht, dict) else None\n        if ht_uri not in LIDO_ISSUED:\n            continue\n        oc = ev.get(\"occuredAt\")\n        if not oc:\n            continue\n        ts_ref = oc.get(\"resource\") if isinstance(oc, dict) else oc\n        ts = ts_map.get(ts_ref, {}) if isinstance(ts_ref, str) else {}\n        for key in (\"begin\", \"end\"):\n            dc_issued.extend(_scalar_values(ts.get(key)))\n\n    # agents via hasMet → Event.P11_had_participant\n    agents = []\n    hasMet = cho.get(\"hasMet\") or []\n    if isinstance(hasMet, dict):\n        hasMet = [hasMet]\n    event_map = {\n        e[\"about\"]: e for e in events\n        if isinstance(e, dict) and e.get(\"about\")\n    }\n    about_type_map = build_about_type_map(rdf)\n    for hm in hasMet:\n        if not isinstance(hm, dict):\n            continue\n        ev_ref = hm.get(\"resource\")\n        if not ev_ref:\n            continue\n        ev = event_map.get(ev_ref, {})\n        participants = ev.get(\"P11_had_participant\") or []\n        if isinstance(participants, dict):\n            participants = [participants]\n        for p in participants:\n            if not isinstance(p, dict):\n                continue\n            r = p.get(\"resource\")\n            if r:\n                et = about_type_map.get(r, \"Agent\")\n                node = to_named_node(r, et)\n                if node:\n                    agents.append(node.value)\n\n    # dc_publisher: ProvidedCHO.publisher + Aggregation.dataProvider\n    dp = agg.get(\"dataProvider\") or []\n    if isinstance(dp, dict):\n        dp = [dp]\n    publisher_structs = (\n        _agent_structs(cho.get(\"publisher\"), \"Agent\")\n        + _agent_structs(dp, \"Organization\")\n    )\n\n    return {\n        \"obj_id\":            props.get(\"item-id\", \"\"),\n        \"lang\":              cho.get(\"language\") or \"\",\n        \"title\":             (_scalar_values(cho.get(\"title\")) or [\"\"])[0],\n        \"dc_type\":           (_scalar_values(cho.get(\"dcType\")) or [\"\"])[0],\n        \"dc_creator\":        _agent_structs(cho.get(\"creator\"), \"Agent\"),\n        \"dc_contributor\":    _agent_structs(cho.get(\"contributor\"), \"Agent\"),\n        \"dc_publisher\":      publisher_structs,\n        \"dc_subject\":        _scalar_values(cho.get(\"dcSubject\")),\n        \"dc_subject_uris\":   _resource_values(cho.get(\"dcTermsSubject\"), \"Concept\"),\n        \"dc_date\":           dc_date,\n        \"dc_date_qualifier\": dc_date_qualifier,\n        \"dc_issued\":         dc_issued,\n        \"dc_created\":        dc_created,\n        \"agents\":            agents,\n        \"hierarchy_type\":    (_scalar_values(cho.get(\"hierarchyType\")) or [None])[0],\n        \"is_part_of\":        bool(cho.get(\"isPartOf\")),\n    }",
  "new_string": "def extract_meta(data: dict) -> dict:\n    \"\"\"Extract ProvidedCHO metadata for the Parquet row.\"\"\"\n    props     = data.get(\"properties\", {})\n    prov_info = data.get(\"provider-info\") or {}\n    rdf       = data.get(\"edm\", {}).get(\"RDF\") or {}\n    cho       = rdf.get(\"ProvidedCHO\") or {}\n    if isinstance(cho, list):\n        cho = cho[0] if cho else {}\n\n    events    = rdf.get(\"Event\") or []\n    if isinstance(events, dict):\n        events = [events]\n    timespans = rdf.get(\"TimeSpan\") or []\n    if isinstance(timespans, dict):\n        timespans = [timespans]\n    ts_map = {t[\"about\"]: t for t in timespans if isinstance(t, dict) and t.get(\"about\")}\n\n    concept_labels = _build_concept_labels_map(rdf)\n\n    # -- title + lang_title --\n    title_raw  = cho.get(\"title\")\n    title_str  = \"\"\n    lang_title = \"\"\n    if isinstance(title_raw, list):\n        title_raw = title_raw[0] if title_raw else None\n    if isinstance(title_raw, dict):\n        title_str  = title_raw.get(\"$\") or \"\"\n        lang_title = title_raw.get(\"lang\") or \"\"\n    elif isinstance(title_raw, str):\n        title_str = title_raw\n\n    # -- lang_obj --\n    lang_obj_raw = cho.get(\"language\") or cho.get(\"dcTermsLanguage\")\n    lang_obj = (_scalar_values(lang_obj_raw) or [\"\"])[0]\n\n    # -- dc_type labels --\n    dc_type_labels: list[str] = []\n    dc_type_raw = cho.get(\"dcType\") or []\n    if not isinstance(dc_type_raw, list):\n        dc_type_raw = [dc_type_raw]\n    for v in dc_type_raw:\n        if isinstance(v, dict):\n            lit = v.get(\"$\") or \"\"\n            res = v.get(\"resource\") or \"\"\n            if lit:\n                dc_type_labels.append(lit)\n            elif res and not res.startswith(_DDB_VOCNET) and _is_ext_uri(res):\n                label = concept_labels.get(res)\n                if label:\n                    dc_type_labels.append(label)\n        elif isinstance(v, str) and v:\n            dc_type_labels.append(v)\n\n    # -- dc_subject structs --\n    dc_subj: list[dict] = []\n    for key in (\"dcSubject\", \"dcTermsSubject\", \"dcTermSubject\"):\n        items = cho.get(key) or []\n        if not isinstance(items, list):\n            items = [items]\n        for v in items:\n            if isinstance(v, dict):\n                lit = v.get(\"$\") or \"\"\n                res = v.get(\"resource\") or \"\"\n                if lit:\n                    dc_subj.append({\"name\": lit, \"is_ext_uri\": False})\n                elif res and _is_ext_uri(res) and not res.startswith(_DDB_VOCNET):\n                    label = concept_labels.get(res)\n                    if label:\n                        dc_subj.append({\"name\": label, \"is_ext_uri\": True})\n            elif isinstance(v, str) and v and not _BARE_ID_RE.match(v):\n                dc_subj.append({\"name\": v, \"is_ext_uri\": False})\n\n    # -- agents unified --\n    lido_agents: list[dict] = []\n    hasMet = cho.get(\"hasMet\") or []\n    if isinstance(hasMet, dict):\n        hasMet = [hasMet]\n    event_map = {e[\"about\"]: e for e in events if isinstance(e, dict) and e.get(\"about\")}\n    about_type_map = build_about_type_map(rdf)\n    for hm in hasMet:\n        if not isinstance(hm, dict):\n            continue\n        ev_ref = hm.get(\"resource\")\n        if not ev_ref:\n            continue\n        ev = event_map.get(ev_ref, {})\n        participants = ev.get(\"P11_had_participant\") or []\n        if isinstance(participants, dict):\n            participants = [participants]\n        for p in participants:\n            if not isinstance(p, dict):\n                continue\n            r = p.get(\"resource\") or \"\"\n            lit = p.get(\"$\") or \"\"\n            if r:\n                et = about_type_map.get(r, \"Agent\")\n                node = to_named_node(r, et)\n                name = lit or (node.value if node else \"\")\n                ext  = _is_ext_uri(r)\n                lido_agents.append({\"name\": name, \"type\": \"unknown_event\", \"is_ext_uri\": ext})\n\n    agents = (\n        _new_agent_list(cho.get(\"creator\"),      \"creation\")\n        + _new_agent_list(cho.get(\"publisher\"),  \"publication\")\n        + _new_agent_list(cho.get(\"contributor\"), \"contribution\")\n        + lido_agents\n    )\n\n    # -- dates unified --\n    dates: list[dict] = []\n    dc_date_raw2 = _scalar_values(cho.get(\"date\"))\n    if dc_date_raw2:\n        normed = _parse_dc_date(dc_date_raw2[0])\n        if normed:\n            dates.append({\"value\": normed, \"begin\": None, \"end\": None, \"type\": \"unknown_event\"})\n    for val in _scalar_values(cho.get(\"created\")):\n        dates.append({\"value\": val, \"begin\": None, \"end\": None, \"type\": \"creation\"})\n    for val in _scalar_values(cho.get(\"issued\")):\n        dates.append({\"value\": val, \"begin\": None, \"end\": None, \"type\": \"publication\"})\n    for ev in events:\n        if not isinstance(ev, dict):\n            continue\n        ht = (ev.get(\"hasType\") or {})\n        ht_uri = ht.get(\"resource\") if isinstance(ht, dict) else None\n        for lido_set, dtype in ((LIDO_CREATED, \"creation\"), (LIDO_ISSUED, \"publication\")):\n            if ht_uri not in lido_set:\n                continue\n            oc = ev.get(\"occuredAt\") or ev.get(\"occurredAt\")\n            if not oc:\n                continue\n            ts_ref = oc.get(\"resource\") if isinstance(oc, dict) else oc\n            ts = ts_map.get(ts_ref, {}) if isinstance(ts_ref, str) else {}\n            d = _timespan_to_date(ts, dtype)\n            if d:\n                dates.append(d)\n\n    # -- mediatype / sector (int16) --\n    mediatype: int | None = None\n    sector:    int | None = None\n    concepts_list = rdf.get(\"Concept\") or []\n    if isinstance(concepts_list, dict):\n        concepts_list = [concepts_list]\n    for c in concepts_list:\n        if not isinstance(c, dict):\n            continue\n        about = c.get(\"about\") or \"\"\n        if mediatype is None and \"/medientyp/mt\" in about:\n            try:\n                mediatype = int(about.rsplit(\"/mt\", 1)[-1])\n            except ValueError:\n                pass\n        if sector is None and \"/sparte/sparte\" in about:\n            try:\n                sector = int(about.rsplit(\"/sparte\", 1)[-1])\n            except ValueError:\n                pass\n\n    # -- hierarchy_type (int16) --\n    raw_ht = (_scalar_values(cho.get(\"hierarchyType\")) or [None])[0]\n    htype: int | None = None\n    if raw_ht:\n        try:\n            htype = int(raw_ht.replace(\"htype_\", \"\"))\n        except ValueError:\n            pass\n\n    return {\n        \"obj_id\":         props.get(\"item-id\", \"\"),\n        \"title\":          title_str,\n        \"lang_title\":     lang_title,\n        \"lang_obj\":       lang_obj,\n        \"provider_id\":    prov_info.get(\"provider-ddb-id\", \"\"),\n        \"dataset_id\":     props.get(\"dataset-id\", \"\"),\n        \"dc_type\":        dc_type_labels,\n        \"agents\":         agents,\n        \"dates\":          dates,\n        \"dc_subject\":     dc_subj,\n        \"hierarchy_type\": htype,\n        \"mediatype\":      mediatype,\n        \"sector\":         sector,\n        \"is_part_of\":     bool(cho.get(\"isPartOf\")),\n    }"
}
```
